verification_plan.claim_summary: Confirm rail.vout is defined as nominal 3.3 V with +/-5% tolerance.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: Claim is source-defined and quantitative authority is already identified with no stated conflict; planning basis is document/value confirmation before any downstream execution planning.
verification_plan.criteria_seed: Authority set should consistently state nominal 3.3 V and tolerance +/-5% for rail.vout.

verification_plan.claim_summary: Establish the intended verification path for J1.1_to_U1.VIN harness connectivity.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: Harness status is review_required and owner decision plus fixture procedure are missing; planning cannot responsibly select execution method until ownership and procedure are resolved.
verification_plan.criteria_seed: Owner-approved connection intent, fixture/procedure definition, and authoritative interface mapping must exist before execution-oriented criteria are set.

verification_plan.claim_summary: Prepare startup transient simulation verification path only after required simulation inputs exist.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: The claim explicitly directs simulation before execution, but the fixture states model and deck are missing and simulation is only allowed after defined inputs and criteria exist.
verification_plan.criteria_seed: Model, deck, stimuli, and measurement criteria must be owner-approved and configuration-bound before simulation criteria are finalized.

verification_plan.claim_summary: Determine whether status LED indication of regulator enabled is an intended and source-backed verification claim.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: Official source reference and owner intent are both missing, so the claim cannot yet be anchored to inspection, test, or demonstration criteria.
verification_plan.criteria_seed: An authoritative source and owner intent statement must first establish whether the LED behavior is a required claim.

verification_plan.claim_summary: Resolve board revision baseline conflict affecting downstream verification planning.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: Trace and configuration packet disagree on board revision; conflict resolution is required before affected methods can be trusted.
verification_plan.criteria_seed: A single owner-approved board revision baseline must be established and propagated to affected verification items.

verification_requirements_matrix.requirement_or_claim: Startup transient should be simulated before execution
Board revision baseline for affected verification scope

method_map.selection_rule: Use when approved source and quantitative packet already define the claim without stated conflict.
Use when the claim explicitly requires simulation and readiness inputs can be bounded.
Use when intent, baseline, or conflict resolution is missing and no execution-capable method can be responsibly fixed yet.

verification_gap_register.description: Harness connection claim is marked review_required with missing owner decision.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Owner to declare whether the connection is a formal verification target and which authority packet governs it.

verification_gap_register.description: Fixture or harness procedure is not defined.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Provide bounded fixture/procedure definition before any execution-capable method is proposed.

verification_gap_register.description: Simulation model and deck are missing.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Provide owner-approved model package and deck tied to approved configuration baseline.

verification_gap_register.description: Stimuli and measurement criteria are not defined.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Define startup stimuli and measurable acceptance-oriented observation points without claiming execution.

verification_gap_register.description: No official source reference is present for the LED behavior claim.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Provide approved source backing or retire the claim from the verification set.

verification_gap_register.description: LED behavior intent is not owner-decided.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Owner to state whether LED indication is intended requirement, diagnostic hint, or non-claim behavior.

verification_gap_register.description: Trace identifies board rev A while configuration packet identifies rev B.
verification_gap_register.required_followup: Resolve the revision baseline conflict and rebind all affected verification items to the selected baseline.

verification_plan_provenance.planning_basis: Synthetic fixture only; no file reads, command execution, source acquisition, or verification execution used.

verification_plan_summary.planning_observation: Only the 3.3 V quantitative constraint is plan-ready on the fixture as given; all other items require owner action, missing evidence completion, or conflict resolution before execution-capable verification planning can mature.

boundary_review_note.scope_boundary: This output is a public-safe planning artifact derived only from the supplied synthetic fixture.
